summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Multi Mile Tracker app. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All major frontend features verified working including login, dashboard, trips with classify, expenses, reports, settings, AI assistant, subscription page, and new user registration.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - no health endpoint defined (informational only)

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props deprecated - should use boxShadow (non-critical warnings)
props.pointerEvents deprecated - should use style.pointerEvents (non-critical warnings)

action_items: Consider adding /api/health endpoint for monitoring purposes
Update shadow style props to boxShadow to remove deprecation warnings
Update pointerEvents from props to style to remove deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. Code quality is good.
Dashboard YTD Summary shows 2025 in label but trips data appears to be for 2026 - minor label mismatch
Reports page defaults to current year (2026) - correct behavior
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded trips for test@demo.com. Created new test expense via UI. Registered new user newuser_*@test.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend 15/15 tests passing. All major flows verified: auth, dashboard, trips+classify, expenses+add, reports+year selector+CSV export, settings, AI assistant chat (GPT-4o integration working), subscription plan cards, new account registration. Test credentials: test@demo.com/test123.
